core.label: Zig Fundamentals
core.description: Syntax, types, comptime, and memory management.

topics.label: Installation & Build System
topics.description: Install Zig and use its built-in build system. Zig also serves as a C/C++ cross-compiler.

topics.label: Variables & Types
topics.description: const/var, integers (u8-u128, i8-i128), floats, bool, optionals (?T), and error unions.

topics.label: Control Flow
topics.description: if/else, switch, while, for. if and switch are expressions that return values.

topics.label: Functions
topics.description: fn keyword, comptime parameters, and inline functions. Functions are values.

topics.label: Structs & Enums
topics.description: Structs with methods, tagged unions (enums with payloads). No inheritance — composition only.

topics.label: Slices & Arrays
topics.description: Fixed arrays [N]T and slices []T. Slices are fat pointers with length.

topics.label: Error Handling
topics.description: Error unions (anyerror!T), try, catch, and errdefer. Errors are values, not exceptions.

topics.label: Optionals
topics.description: ?T for nullable values, orelse and .? for unwrapping. No null by default.

topics.label: Memory Management
topics.description: Allocators, no hidden allocations. Choose your allocator per context (arena, page, GPA).

topics.label: Comptime
topics.description: Compile-time code execution for generics, constants, and metaprogramming. Zig's defining feature.

core.label: Advanced Zig
core.description: Async, C interop, testing, and the standard library.

topics.label: Pointers
topics.description: *T single pointers, [*]T many pointers, and pointer arithmetic. Explicit but safe.

topics.label: C Interop
topics.description: @cImport to include C headers directly. Zig can compile and link C code seamlessly.

topics.label: Testing
topics.description: Built-in test blocks with test "name" { }. Run tests with zig test.

topics.label: Standard Library
topics.description: std.mem, std.fs, std.net, std.json, std.fmt. Comprehensive but minimal standard library.

topics.label: Build System (build.zig)
topics.description: Configure builds programmatically in Zig. Dependencies, cross-compilation, and custom steps.

topics.label: Async I/O
topics.description: async/await and event loops for concurrent I/O. Still evolving in Zig.
